languages.text: {n}Машинный дух сервочерепа ослаб, но все же реагирует на диагностическую литанию и являет к осмотру содержимое черепной коробки. В ней покоятся лишь управляющий {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}микрокогитатор{/g}, соответствующий имперским стандартам набор манипуляторов и самописец, фиксирующий логи. Из шлангов, соединяющих череп с телом, сочится полупрозрачная опалесцирующая жидкость. Органические компоненты полностью отсутствуют — либо гемункул удалил их в ходе своих чудовищных опытов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Машинный дух сервочерепа ослаб, но все же реагирует на диагностическую литанию и являет к осмотру содержимое черепной коробки. В ней покоятся лишь управляющий {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}микрокогитатор{/g}, соответствующий имперским стандартам набор манипуляторов и самописец, фиксирующий логи. Из шлангов, соединяющих череп с телом, сочится полупрозрачная опалесцирующая жидкость. Органические компоненты полностью отсутствуют — либо гемункул удалил их в ходе своих чудовищных опытов.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The servo-skull's machine spirit is weakened, but still responds to the diagnostic litany and reveals the contents of the skull. It contains only a control {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}micro-cogitator{/g}, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. A translucent, opalescent liquid oozes from the hoses connecting the skull to the body. All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サーボ・スカルの機械霊は弱まっているが、診断の呪文に反応し、スカルの中身がわかる。中には制御用{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}マイクロ・コギテーター{/g}、帝国標準の操作装置、そしてログ記録用のオートキールがあるだけだ。スカルと本体を繋ぐホースから、半透明のオパール色の液体が出ている。有機物は全くない。ヘモンクルスが恐ろしい実験の中で取り除いたのだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull's machine spirit is weakened, but still responds to the diagnostic litany and reveals the contents of the skull. It contains only a control {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}micro-cogitator{/g}, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. A translucent, opalescent liquid oozes from the hoses connecting the skull to the body. All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El espíritu máquina del servocráneo está débil, pero sigue respondiendo la letanía de diagnóstico y revela el contenido del cráneo. Solo hay un {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}microcogitador{/g} de control, un conjunto de manipuladores estándar del Imperium y una autopluma para los registros. De las mangueras que conectan el cráneo al cuerpo rezuma un líquido translúcido opalescente. No queda ningún componente orgánico, el Hemónculo debe de haberlos extraído durante sus monstruosos experimentos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull's machine spirit is weakened, but still responds to the diagnostic litany and reveals the contents of the skull. It contains only a control {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}micro-cogitator{/g}, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. A translucent, opalescent liquid oozes from the hoses connecting the skull to the body. All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El espíritu máquina del servocráneo está débil, pero sigue respondiendo la letanía de diagnóstico y revela el contenido del cráneo. Solo hay un {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}microcogitador{/g} de control, un conjunto de manipuladores estándar del Imperium y una autopluma para los registros. De las mangueras que conectan el cráneo al cuerpo rezuma un líquido translúcido opalescente. languages.text: {n}Der Maschinengeist des Servoschädels ist geschwächt, spricht aber auf die diagnostische Litanei an und offenbart die Inhalte des Schädels. Er enthält lediglich einen {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Mikrocogitator{/g} als Steuerung, einen Satz imperiale Manipulatoren und eine Autofeder für Protokollierungszwecke. Eine durchscheinende, schimmernde Flüssigkeit sickert aus den Schläuchen, die den Schädel mit dem Körper verbinden. Es gibt keinerlei organische Komponenten ... der Haemonculus muss sie im Rahmen seiner monströsen Experimente entfernt haben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull's machine spirit is weakened, but still responds to the diagnostic litany and reveals the contents of the skull. It contains only a control {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}micro-cogitator{/g}, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. A translucent, opalescent liquid oozes from the hoses connecting the skull to the body. All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Maschinengeist des Servoschädels ist geschwächt, spricht aber auf die diagnostische Litanei an und offenbart die Inhalte des Schädels. Er enthält lediglich einen {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Mikrocogitator{/g} als Steuerung, einen Satz imperiale Manipulatoren und eine Autofeder für Protokollierungszwecke. Eine durchscheinende, schimmernde Flüssigkeit sickert aus den Schläuchen, die den Schädel mit dem Körper verbinden. Es gibt keinerlei organische Komponenten ... der Haemonculus muss sie im Rahmen seiner monströsen Experimente entfernt haben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'esprit de la machine du servocrâne est affaibli, mais répond tout de même à la litanie diagnostique en révélant le contenu du crâne. Vous y distinguez un {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}microcogitateur{/g}, un ensemble de manipulateurs standardisés de l'Imperium ainsi qu'une autoplume. Un liquide opalescent s'écoule lentement des tuyaux reliant le crâne au reste du corps. Les composants organiques semblent totalement absents : l'hémoncule a dû les retirer au cours de ses abjectes expériences.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull's machine spirit is weakened, but still responds to the diagnostic litany and reveals the contents of the skull. It contains only a control {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}micro-cogitator{/g}, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. A translucent, opalescent liquid oozes from the hoses connecting the skull to the body. All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'esprit de la machine du servocrâne est affaibli, mais répond tout de même à la litanie diagnostique en révélant le contenu du crâne. languages.text: {n}伺服头骨的机魂十分虚弱，但仍对诊断祷文有所响应，向你揭示了颅骨内部的构造：其中仅有一个控制型{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}微型沉思者{/g}、一套帝国制式触须，以及一支用于记录日志的自动羽毛笔。连接颅骨与躯体的软管中渗出半透明的乳浊液体。所有有机部件已完全缺失——显然，血伶人在恐怖骇人的实验中把它们尽数剥除了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull's machine spirit is weakened, but still responds to the diagnostic litany and reveals the contents of the skull. It contains only a control {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}micro-cogitator{/g}, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. A translucent, opalescent liquid oozes from the hoses connecting the skull to the body. All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伺服头骨的机魂十分虚弱，但仍对诊断祷文有所响应，向你揭示了颅骨内部的构造：其中仅有一个控制型{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}微型沉思者{/g}、一套帝国制式触须，以及一支用于记录日志的自动羽毛笔。连接颅骨与躯体的软管中渗出半透明的乳浊液体。所有有机部件已完全缺失——显然，血伶人在恐怖骇人的实验中把它们尽数剥除了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hizmeletin makine ruhu zayıflamış olsa da teşhis ilahisine hâlâ yanıt veriyor ve kafatasının içeriğini açığa çıkarıyor. İçinde sadece bir kontrol {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}mikrokavramsayarı{/g}, İmparatorluk standardı bir çevirteç seti ve kayıt tutan bir otoyazar bulunuyor. Kafatasını vücuda bağlayan hortumlardan yarı saydam, yanardöner bir sıvı sızıyor. Hiçbir organik bileşen görülmüyor. Haimonkulus, canavarca deneyleri sırasında onları çıkarmış olmalı.{/n}

All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}
